name: Easy Boston Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Yellow cake layer, baked and cooled or buy premade from supermarket (8 or 9 inch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together pudding mix and milk in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until the mixture comes to a full boil.
2. Remove from heat. Combine 1 cup hot pudding with chocolate and butter. Stir until chocolate is melted and the mixture is smooth. Add almond extract. Stir to mix well.
3. Fold in whipped cream.
4. Split cake layer into two. Place one cake layer in an 8 or 9 inch cake pan lined with plastic wrap. Cover with vanilla pudding mix.
5. Place second layer on top and spread with chocolate pudding mix.
6. Chill for a few hours.
7. To serve, lift the "cream pie" out of the pan and place on a serving plate. Serve cut into wedges.
